mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, sen_id, sen_name, sen_desc, sen_type, sen_def, sen_content, sen_md5, inner_share, deprecated, sen_mode
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_sec_sensitive WHERE sen_id = #{senStrId} and inner_share = 1 limit 1
mapper.update: update dm_sec_sensitive set sen_id = #{senDO.senId}, sen_name = #{senDO.name}, sen_desc = #{senDO.description}, sen_type = #{senDO.scriptType, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleScriptType}, sen_def = #{senDO.scriptDef}, sen_content = #{senDO.scriptContent}, sen_md5 = #{senDO.scriptMD5}, sen_mode = #{senDO.senMode, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleSensitiveMode}, inner_share = #{senDO.innerShare}, deprecated = #{senDO.deprecated}, gmt_modified = now() WHERE id = #{senId} and inner_share = 1 limit 1
mapper.delete: update dm_sec_sensitive set deprecated = 1, gmt_modified= now() WHERE sen_id = #{senStrId} and inner_share = 1 limit 1
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_sec_sensitive WHERE (owner_uid = #{ownerUid} or inner_share = 1) AND (sen_name like concat('%',#{searchKeywords},'%') or sen_desc like concat('%',#{searchKeywords},'%')) order by gmt_create desc

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_sensitive WHERE (owner_uid = #{ownerUid} or inner_share = 1) order by gmt_create desc

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_sensitive WHERE id in #{item} and ((owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and inner_share = 0) or inner_share = 1) order by gmt_create desc

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_sensitive WHERE id = #{senId} and ((owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and inner_share = 0) or inner_share = 1) limit 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dm_sec_sensitive WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} AND id = #{senId} and inner_share = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update dm_sec_sensitive set sen_name = #{senDO.name}, sen_desc = #{senDO.description}, sen_type = #{senDO.scriptType, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleScriptType}, sen_def = #{senDO.scriptDef}, sen_content = #{senDO.scriptContent}, sen_md5 = #{senDO.scriptMD5}, sen_mode = #{senDO.senMode, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleSensitiveMode}, gmt_modified = now() WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} AND id = #{senId} and inner_share = 0 limit 1
